lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What were Eli’s sons, Hophni and Phinehas, like?
answers: They were wicked and did not honor the Lord
They were very tall and strong

questions.text: When Eli warned his sons about their sin, what did they do?
answers: They did not listen to him
They turned from their sins immediately
They ran away from the Tabernacle
In a tent outside the Tabernacle

questions.text: Who called out to Samuel in the night?
Who did Samuel think was calling him?
How many times did Samuel run to Eli after hearing his name?
What did Eli tell Samuel to say when God called again?
answers: Speak, Lord, for your servant is listening

questions.text: What message did God give Samuel?
answers: Eli’s sons would be punished and his family would no longer be priests
Israel needed to go to war

questions.text: How did Samuel feel the next morning?
answers: He was afraid to tell Eli God’s message
He was sleepy because God kept waking him up
He was excited to share God's message
He was confused and thought he had been dreaming

questions.text: What did Eli say when he heard the message?
answers: He is the Lord; let Him do what is best
Why would God do this to me?
